Deann Graham Theme Stylesheet

Typography

Light Background

Body Text

This is a paragraph with lead class.

Regular paragraph text goes here. Underlined text and strong text.

Cupcake ipsum dolor sit amet. Cupcake halvah croissant chocolate lollipop candy canes. Pastry jelly beans biscuit bonbon fruitcake pastry croissant pie tiramisu. Toffee shortbread apple pie donut shortbread. Lemon drops lollipop sweet roll cake wafer sesame snaps chocolate. Shortbread shortbread caramels tootsie roll chocolate cake. Bonbon icing sesame snaps jelly beans soufflé gummies sesame snaps lollipop. Muffin icing toffee pastry liquorice tiramisu muffin croissant jujubes.

Body Text

This is a paragraph with lead class.

Cupcake ipsum dolor sit amet. Cupcake halvah croissant chocolate lollipop candy canes. Pastry jelly beans biscuit bonbon fruitcake pastry croissant pie tiramisu. Toffee shortbread apple pie donut shortbread. Lemon drops lollipop sweet roll cake wafer sesame snaps chocolate. Shortbread shortbread caramels tootsie roll chocolate cake. Grid Layout

Bootstrap's grid system allows you to create responsive layouts with ease. Below are examples of different column configurations using Bootstrap's grid classes. It is based on 12 column grid.

2 Columns 50%

Column 1 (50%)
Column 2 (50%)

Mixed Columns 66% / 33%

Wide Column (66%)
Narrow Column (33%)

3 Columns 33%

Column 1 (33%)
Column 2 (33%)
Column 3 (33%)

4 Columns 25%

Column 1 (25%)
Column 2 (25%)
Column 3 (25%)
Column 4 (25%)
